utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all seven. Each one is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is clear; travel_dates (2024-09-25 to 2024-09-29) are explicit; transportation includes airline, airports, class, and price; accommodation includes name, type, location, prices, amenities, and cancellation policy; activities have a list, cost, difficulty, and guide details; additional_services include dining details with cost; total_budget provides a full cost breakdown with totals and remaining budget. All required details are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following elements: destination 'Lisbon, Portugal'; airline 'Ryanair' in economy class (a budget airline); accommodation 'Eco Lodge'; activities: 'Yoga retreat', 'City walking tour', and 'Coastal hike'; restaurant 'Organic Farm-to-Table'. The ground-truth ratings list provides ratings for Lisbon (7), budget airline economy class (10), Eco Lodge (10), Yoga Retreat (10), City Walking Tour (9), and Organic Farm-to-Table (10). There is no specific rating listed for 'Coastal hike', so it is omitted from the mapping since it does not exist in the ground truth. Therefore, the mapped ratings are derived directly from the ground-truth data for the matching items.
